{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230331189B988F055FEF93311B77"}"},"total":1794},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7527745680122266392","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄历史类难得的好书，对人性刻画和战争描写相当到位，行文流畅，节奏不紧不慢，强烈推荐[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752702070,"group_id":"7457489452789681214","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzqhQ2ae0XsAV29tznr4R01qoW47vrwfdMDbegAUFXeA","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"1574924326282304","user_name":"爱吃红豆蓉的叶流云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1574924326282304","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774163548,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7457489452789681214","book_info":{"abstract":"(争霸.统一.爽文.后宫.强势碾压)
穿越三国，成为落魄的汉室宗亲，开局截胡关羽张飞，结拜为兄弟。
为了在这乱世之中活下去，选择参军，历经磨难，披荆斩棘，平定黄巾，封侯拜将，割据一方，招揽文臣武将，操练精锐之师，手握天下权，醉卧美人膝，坐看风云变动。
待时机到来，携数万铁骑，马踏山河，气吞万里如虎，扫尽天下枭雄，一统江山，三造大汉，汉室永传。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/96b8f9175a495184e459c5b80148dacb","author":"星星之云","author_id":"","book_id":"7457489452789681214","book_name":"三国：开局截胡关羽，强娶皇后","book_short_name":"三国霸主传","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":67,"name":"三国","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67&name=三国&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7457525432871551550","read_count":"73135","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2356942"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1151","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,开局,争霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e1e136095313cbb38bc965bd96003422~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779391878&x-signature=ekbQUt1QmVQr7XyoehARoHCKCAo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"75978924761","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"635"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230331189B988F055FEF93311B77"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,"
